text:
when {
    this == Bitmap.Config.ALPHA_8 -> 1
    this == Bitmap.Config.RGB_565 -> 2
    this == Bitmap.Config.ARGB_4444 -> 2
    SDK_INT >= 26 && this == Bitmap.Config.RGBA_F16 -> 8
    else -> 4
}

when (this) {
    Logger.Level.Verbose -> Log.VERBOSE
    Logger.Level.Debug -> Log.DEBUG
    Logger.Level.Info -> Log.INFO
    Logger.Level.Warn -> Log.WARN
    Logger.Level.Error -> Log.ERROR
}

when (this) {
    DataSource.MEMORY_CACHE,
    DataSource.MEMORY,
    -> "🧠"
    DataSource.DISK -> "💾"
    DataSource.NETWORK -> "☁️"
}
